name: e2e
description: Browser e2e gate: wraps tools/e2e/run_wizard_{cr2,seestar}.mjs. The executor owns a FRESH Vite port + curl prewarm + exact-PID cleanup of Vite AND the runner tree on all paths. Reproduces the pinned reference solves byte-identically; deposits a sha-keyed row per scenario.

manifest.comment: gate lane — scenarios are the input, not the enumerated corpus.
